title: Sub items for Sub Items
excerpt: I note that the old discussion on this item was closed over 2 years ago and there appears to have been no progress, when can we expect to be able to put sub-items under sub-items, or at least add a “To Do list” to a sub …

posts.author: James66 (James Franklin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I note that the old discussion on this item was closed over 2 years ago and there appears to have been no progress, when can we expect to be able to put sub-items under sub-items, or at least add a “To Do list” to a sub item that shows underneath it.

I can see this being useful to many organisations not just us, it may actually be the reason many have not come over to Monday from other platforms. As an engineer I can have a project rumming that may have up to 100 sub items on a given project, and that each of those may have anything from 10 to 50 sub-items. I know there are work arounds linking to seperate boards bla bla bla - but that is like buying a small car, then taking the bus because you can’t fit ever member of your family in it - pointless.
